The Good Dinosaur (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $123,087,120Details
International Box Office $210,683,917
Worldwide Box Office $333,771,037
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $35,003,712
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $30,660,382
Total $65,664,094
Further financial details...

Synopsis

"The Good Dinosaur" asks the generations-old question: What if the asteroid that forever changed life on Earth missed the planet completely and giant dinosaurs never became extinct? The film is an original story about Arlo, a lively Apatosaurus with a big heart. After a traumatic event unsettles Arlo’s family, he sets out on a remarkable journey, gaining an unlikely companion along the way - a human boy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,155,217 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$187,500,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,749 opening theaters/3,749 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $174,182,558

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 25th, 2015 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Cambodia)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Vietnam)
Video Release: February 23rd, 2016 by Disney Pixar
MPA Rating: PG for peril, action and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2396 (Cert #50033), 10/21/2015)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Development Hell, Directing Yourself, Intertitle, Prologue
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Alternate History, Cavemen, Dinosaurs, Humans as Pets, Orphan, Talking Animals, Extreme Weather, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Disney-Pixar
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

"The Good Dinosaur" asks the generations-old question: What if the asteroid that forever changed life on Earth missed the planet completely and giant dinosaurs never became extinct? The film is an original story about Arlo, a lively Apatosaurus with a big heart. After a traumatic event unsettles Arlo’s family, he sets out on a remarkable journey, gaining an unlikely companion along the way - a human boy.
